basic_details.short_information: BIS Recruitment 2026 offers 20 vacancies for Section Officer posts. Eligible candidates with Any Post Graduate, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma can apply through the official BIS website, bis.gov.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News/Rozgar Samachar

qualification.education_qualification: Any Post Graduate, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma

selection_process: Will be intimated separately to shortlisted candidates
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit applications through proper channel (Forwarding Authority) via Speed Post only:
seo_tags: BIS Section Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
